nasb.text: He took away the treasures of the house of the Lord and the treasures of the king’s house, and he took everything, even taking all the shields of gold which Solomon had made.

esv.text: He took away the treasures of the house of the Lord and the treasures of the king’s house. He took away everything. He also took away all the shields of gold that Solomon had made,

cnv.text: 他奪去了耶和華的寶物和王宮的寶物，並且把所有的東西都奪去了；又把所羅門所做的一切金盾牌都奪了去。

ccb.text: 抢走了耶和华的殿和王宫里所有的宝物，包括所罗门制造的金盾牌。
